Unlike the stupid reviews that are aware that the game doesn't work for multiplayer AKA Custom zombies with friends due to the companies laziness PEOPLE CONTINUE to thumbs up the game without leaving bad reviews so people who are looking to buy it aren't wasting their money and time. You'll have to buy the game off a key site instead of on steam because the keys they have on steam are outdated and when you try to make an online account it will decline it and leave you at a loop of trying to make an account. So don't listen to the stupid positive reviews, they bought a game for a 3hr campaign due to a lack of friends aware of the issues online and pretend it isn't happening. DO NOT BUY ON STEAM UNTIL THEY FIX IT OTHERWISE ENJOY SINGLE PLAYER & A HEADACHE.

edit- comments closed bc too many people wanna blow plutonium devs and activision, this isn't reddit lmao, you shouldnt have to use third party software to play a game you pay for on steam :)

Online doesnt work if you buy the game nowadays. You cant do co-op campaign with your homie or even do zombies or anything. So 0/10 for multiplayer

The STORY now though... It's the best call of duty to ever be made. The OG, The classic, You just cant NOT play this story.

This game turned me into a huge fan of World War II and Soviet music;I was particularly captivated by the game’s soundtrack and the character Viktor Reznov.Gary Oldman,who voiced the character of Viktor Reznov,turned this character into a legend.He did a fantastic job.The scenes of soldiers losing limbs which we encountered for the first time back then and the World War II experience the game offered were in a word, amazing.Activision should release a remake of this game.
please do not play this game vanilla as you could be in danger of your privacy of persnal data. use plutonium i leave a bad review as its bizarre this should even be said

Best WW2 FPS campaign available. Best CoD game period. Gritty, violent, gory, intense and non-apologetic. If you want WW2 FPS gameplay where politics and developers being fearful of offending their audience doesn't exist, this game is for you.
Amazing game, but....... DO NOTBUY!!!!! game wont let you play online its broken.
back when Call of duty was still call of duty and Activision actually made great games with great stories. 18 years later and this remains on of the best games.
This game is a classic even tho you only play solo I really don't mind playing solo on zombies or campaign, but unless you want to do high rounds be my guess.

Multiplayer does not work. The consensus online is the key servers are no longer functioning so the game is unplayable in multiplayer. Steam refused to refund because it's been over 2 weeks since purchase, despite me having 0 hours in game.

Honestly? Great game. I understand that the COD series has caught a fair bit of flack over the past few years, but you really can't go wrong with the older games. I also loved the cameo of The Green near the end at Shuri Castle, giving his all to help the Americans capture the point. Great game, great game.

BUYER BEWARE: If you bought this game after 2021 the coop does not work. Its something to do with the COD key, which means you have to buy an old key off of someone and trust that they will not screw you over. Its really disappointing that Activison did not think about this.
great game great graphics

Very fun, great story, zombies.

well worth the 20 bucks even without multiplayer

Call of Duty World at War is a great game. The story, the gameplay, the voice acting. Yet, this version on PC is horrendous. It is barely playable and when you finally get it to work, the gameplay is extremely choppy and glitchy. It was a nightmare to play to the point that I did, in this version of the game, and this is the first Call of Duty game that I have had to quit because of how bad the port is. Do NOT buy this version of the game! If you have an Xbox, get it on there. This is a nightmare of a port and it is shameful that this is even being sold, especially for the price.

Outstanding game, before COD turned to the absolute ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ they are today, probably the best COD game I've ever played. Everything from the story to the soundtrack is amazing, and it encapsulates the atmosphere and brutality of war to the fullest capacity that a video game can give.

(singleplayer campaign experience)
one of the most cinematic fps games ive ever played, battlefield campaigns can't compete with this. both japanese and german maps were immersive and very detailed; in the japanese maps you had to fight in trenches and heavy vegetation while spotting hidden japanese soldiers who would ambush you with banzai charges, while in german maps you had to fight in cqc in large buildings or spot german snipers behind windows far away. american story was less interesting but russian story made me feel the most glory ever in any game, especially the iconic ending.

game was not as repetitive as i thought since the mission isn't always the same, and also there are two different stories. i played on hardened difficulty since i heard veteran was a joke, and the difficulty was somewhat hard but not too much since i had to move safely under cover while avoiding/throwing back grenades. your allies aren't useless either since they can actually kill the enemy, i even saw one ally save my life since he threw the grenade back at the enemy when it was about to kill me.

overall, despite being almost 20 years old this game is very worth it for the campaign, the story, gameplay, AI, and maps are actually better than most modern fps campaigns. this game is also one of the more iconic cod games. 

10/10, my only critique is that it should have been longer.

this review is mainly zombies focused, because god no other CoD zombies has made me feel as unnerved and uncomfortable as the OG. zombies has definitely had some lows recently with bo6 and mwz but also some highs with bo7 lately, but ALL of it pales so much in comparison to WaW, 4 amazing maps with equally amazing atmospheres and a story so intriguing that nobody could've ever guessed where it went in the coming games, we love u and miss u WaW, please drop the price tho $20 is insane </3

The first COD game i have ever played in my 27 years. Storyline and characters are good. Since the game was released in 2008, It is not bad graphics for that time. Highly recommended. Also as a person who is big fan of Wolfenstein. It is the another plus for me to fight against German (Nazi`s).

AFTER BUYING, DOWNLOAD PLUTONIUM LAUNCHER! (hours are not counted on Steam)
It allows you to run the game on higher FPS, higher refresh rate, higher FOV and higher anti-aliasing.

The best Call of Duty campaign ever. Had no issues running on modern specs, and no crashes or bugs encountered. You don't really care much for the characters and the story is a bit short, but the campaign is so well designed and immersive that it feels a lot longer than it actually is.

The Zombies is AMAZING. Verrückt is easily one of my favourite maps in the entire series, it's absolutely terrifying and is way better than the goreslop that modern "scary" COD zombies is.

Honestly, best fps campaign of all time.
Its really that good. The story was amazing, combat is just right to point that there is not rage quilting (unless on hard mode)  This game made me shed a tear because of how good the game is  9/10, if you want a good fps story game, this is the one.

Even though this is a old game, its still so iconic and great. The gameplay is great, the realism is great, and i just love everything about this game. I feel like out of all the other ww2 games i've played nothing compares to this. STRONGLY recommended.

Call of duty world at war was amazing.

I never have been a real call of duty fan but after playing this I am just amazed, I played the modern COD and old COD and realized that the modern COD ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ sucks. COD WAW is a really good ww2 game, the weapons feel nice, especially the mp-40, every MP-40 feels good but this one is amazing. the maps are incredibly realistic and the attention to detail scratches my history addicted brain, and the map design is amazing. "JAPAN IN A WW2 GAME? HOW OUTRAGOUS!" <--- ♥♥♥♥ you. Japan is so good, mostly because Japan is never refrenced in ww2. Thanks old cod.

10/10

Still a decent game but them graphics are starting to look ancient, 
Also multiplayer does not work

my favorite call of duty its such a shame we may never see something like this again the history the music the little elements of actions you can take and the dark gritty atmosphere is all so mixed perfectly into what i call one of the most perfect games to ever come out it really honors history and wears it on its sleave and its not afraid to do so i just wish more games can do this...

I can not recommend this game enough, I got it for the zombies, but the campaign was so much better than I thought it was going to be, I personally think the graphics are great, the bar for graphics has just been too high lately, and experiencing this reminded me of that. 
My favorite part is the gunplay, I was surprised with how fun the game is. Veteran is fun apart from the few unfair sections that was never made to be played on veteran, but aside from that it's a great challenge. 
10/10

Have not played multiplayer because hearing about the hackers deter me from opening multiplayer.

i loved how it fouces on two soliders one in the west and one in the east, seeing both sides of the war but mostly i spent most of my time playing zombies and i will say the modding is very easy and fun to do

a good old WW2 shooter game never gets old. Came here after childhood memories. Too bad the multiplayer servers is empty now. Wish Activison remastered it someday. 

-May, Thuesday 14th, 2026

Nothing hits quite like listening to ‘Welcome to the Jungle’ while realizing the jungle is actively shooting back at you. WaW really captured the feeling of being personally hated by every tree, bush, and vaguely suspicious patch of grass on the map
Hands down best Call of Duty experience avaliable, definitely need a remaster
